members.name: numLines
members.description: Get the number of lines of the outputted text, after operations such as word-wrap have been applied.

members.name: ascender
members.description: The ascender of the font, as described by the font's metrics.

members.name: descender
members.description: The descender of the font, as described by the font's metrics.

members.name: capHeight
members.description: The cap height of the font, as described by the font's metrics. This is usually the height of a capital H.

members.name: xHeight
members.description: The x height of the font, as described by the font's metrics. This is usually the height of a lower case x.

members.name: lineGap
members.description: The suggested gap between lines, as described by the font's metrics.

members.name: numGlyphs
members.description: The number of glyphs that were generated. Note that this isn't nessesarily the number of characters (code points) in the original string.

methods.name: fontSupportsChars
methods.description: Returns True if every character maps to a glyph. This doesn't mean the font supports the language in all cases. Glyphs that come from ligatures etc. may still be missing from the font. *str - The string to be analyzed.

methods.name: lines
methods.description: Get the number of lines of the outputted text, after operations such as word-wrap have been applied.

_provenance.fact: scraped from the TextSOP Class wiki page
